inclusions: Edible vegetables and certain roots and tubers (potatoes, tomatoes, onions, cabbages, lettuces, carrots, cucumbers, leguminous vegetables, etc.)
Edible mushrooms, truffles, olives, capers, marrows, pumpkins, aubergines, sweet corn (Zea mays var. saccharata)
Fruits of the genus Capsicum or of the genus Pimenta (fresh, chilled, or provisionally preserved)
Herbs used as vegetables: fennel, parsley, chervil, tarragon, cress and sweet marjoram

Vegetables that are fresh, chilled, frozen (uncooked or cooked by steaming or boiling in water), provisionally preserved (unsuitable for immediate consumption), or dried (whole, cut, sliced, broken or in powder)
Manioc, arrowroot, salep, Jerusalem artichokes, sweet potatoes and similar roots and tubers with high starch or inulin content (fresh, chilled, frozen or dried)

exclusions.condition: Forage products (e.g., swedes, mangolds, fodder roots, hay, lucerne) intended for animal feed
Sweet corn in the forms of flour, groats, meal, or pellets
Flour, meal, powder, flakes, granules and pellets of potatoes
Flour, meal and powder of the dried leguminous vegetables (beans, peas, lentils, etc.)
Dried, or crushed, or ground fruits of the genus Capsicum or Pimenta (dried peppers, paprika powder)
Vegetables treated or prepared such that they are suitable for immediate consumption (e.g., canned, pickled to be eaten directly)
